tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS rows, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen
FROM $metrics_dataset
WHERE metric_name LIKE 'otelcol%'
GROUP BY metric_name
ORDER BY metric_name
tiles.title: OTel Collector Metric Inventory

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT component_type, component, COUNT(DISTINCT metric_name) AS metrics, COUNT(*) AS rows
FROM (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN receiver IS NOT NULL THEN 'receiver'
           WHEN processor IS NOT NULL THEN 'processor'
           WHEN exporter IS NOT NULL THEN 'exporter'
           ELSE 'process'
         END AS component_type,
         COALESCE(receiver, processor, exporter, "service.name", 'unknown') AS component,
         metric_name
  FROM $metrics_dataset
  WHERE metric_name LIKE 'otelcol%'
) t
GROUP BY component_type, component
ORDER BY component_type, rows DESC
tiles.title: Active Collector Components
Receiver Metric Points Accepted vs Refused
Receiver Log Records Accepted vs Refused
Processor Metric Points Incoming vs Outgoing
Processor Log Records Incoming vs Outgoing
Processor Metric Points Accepted / Refused / Dropped
Processor Log Records Accepted / Refused / Dropped
Exporter Metric Points Sent / Failed / Enqueue
Exporter Log Records Sent / Failed / Enqueue
Runtime Sys Memory Min / Avg / Max
Runtime Heap Memory Min / Avg / Max
Service Instance Details
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT "service.instance.id" AS service_instance_id,
       "service.name" AS service_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT metric_name) AS metrics,
       MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen,
       MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen
FROM $metrics_dataset
WHERE metric_name LIKE 'otelcol%'
  AND "service.name" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "service.instance.id", "service.name"
ORDER BY last_seen DESC

tiles.title: Spans Flow Summary
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT component_type, component, SUM(samples) AS samples
FROM (
  SELECT 'receiver' AS component_type, COALESCE(receiver, 'unknown') AS component, COUNT(*) AS samples
  FROM $metrics_dataset
  WHERE metric_name = 'otelcol_receiver_accepted_spans' AND receiver IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY receiver
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'exporter' AS component_type, COALESCE(exporter, 'unknown') AS component, COUNT(*) AS samples
  FROM $metrics_dataset
  WHERE metric_name = 'otelcol_exporter_sent_spans' AND exporter IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY exporter
) t
GROUP BY component_type, component
ORDER BY component_type, samples DESC

tiles.title: Metric Points Flow Summary
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT component_type, component, SUM(samples) AS samples
FROM (
  SELECT 'receiver' AS component_type, COALESCE(receiver, 'unknown') AS component, COUNT(*) AS samples
  FROM $metrics_dataset
  WHERE metric_name = 'otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points' AND receiver IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY receiver
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'exporter' AS component_type, COALESCE(exporter, 'unknown') AS component, COUNT(*) AS samples
  FROM $metrics_dataset
  WHERE metric_name = 'otelcol_exporter_sent_metric_points' AND exporter IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY exporter
) t
GROUP BY component_type, component
ORDER BY component_type, samples DESC

tiles.title: Log Records Flow Summary
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT component_type, component, SUM(samples) AS samples
FROM (
  SELECT 'receiver' AS component_type, COALESCE(receiver, 'unknown') AS component, COUNT(*) AS samples
  FROM $metrics_dataset
  WHERE metric_name = 'otelcol_receiver_accepted_log_records' AND receiver IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY receiver
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'exporter' AS component_type, COALESCE(exporter, 'unknown') AS component, COUNT(*) AS samples
  FROM $metrics_dataset
  WHERE metric_name = 'otelcol_exporter_sent_log_records' AND exporter IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY exporter
) t
GROUP BY component_type, component
ORDER BY component_type, samples DESC
